summary: Update hiring details for hired placement
description: Update hiring details for hired placement. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/placements/{id}/hiring_details. Required parameters: id, placement, company_id.

params.name: placement
params.description: Placement params: hired_at (datetime, optional) - date when candidate was hired; job_starts_at (datetime, optional) - date when candidate starts job; opening_id (integer, required when requisitions are enabled); work_location_id (active Locations assigned to placement or job, required)
